calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 Trial. No appearance by defendant.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Self Respresented Plaintiff VANESSA M. WOODS present in Court.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant GREGORY WAYNE KENNY

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Principal $11,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $11,000.00
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2015 Set For Trial On Dec-14-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
